text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Apparently there's a test-taking strategy where
you write numbers on a pencil and give it a roll. If
you ask me, that's pure nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You can't leave everything up to fate. It's not a
real bet unless you really throw yourself into it.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If it were me, I'd bet on what kinda questions are
gonna show up—then study nothing else!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You can't think about what happens if you guess
wrong. Can't get fired up without a little risk, am I
right?
